Good service. Large station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLX29hMkdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo conozco hace muchos años....  fué renovado en la actualidad... pero sigue siendo muy básico comparando a otras Aca... el agua caliente es gratis... de los 3 baños diaponibles en Febrero 21  sólo funcionaba 1.

(Translated by Google)
I've known it for many years.... it was recently renovated... but it's still very basic compared to other places here... hot water is free... of the 3 bathrooms available on February 21st, only 1 was working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dTY2RlRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, tarde 27 minutos en cargar nafta,  muy pésimo la atención poco personal , sin palabras .

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, it took me 27 minutes to fill up with gas, the service was terrible and impersonal, speechless.
